做的游戏顺序现在是“人类一败涂地—崩坏学院2—崩坏3—我的世界—原神”","text_exts":[{"e":51,"s":47,"text":"我的世界","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774250706659DA49E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227108031688273969954%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227099271295698734095%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1654968162,"group_id":"7099271295698734095","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"幸福本是具象化，可我连投影都看不到...","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2jyVpzqw5h95gBNbY6XIBc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ad15583a4b954a88b06691c0d7025a9c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794464&x-signature=r0tAQRqEQ0kb8AI15QnMcIrarTc%3D","user_id":"52151185004","user_name":"入冬了宝宝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"52151185004","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7099271295698734095","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越】+【单或无女主】+【无系统】+【金手指】+【直播】+【轻松】
徐朔穿越的到了一处平行世界，却发现这个世界的游戏主要在PC端，没有主机，掌机，手机端上则都是一些益智和棋牌游戏。
大厂商的目光刚开始投向手机端，徐朔当即决定要创立米忽悠公司！
在他们都在摸着石头过河的时候，徐朔已经开始自由泳。
崩坏2的推出拉开了全新手游时代。
Minecraft让玩家们知道了什么叫做真正的沙盒游戏。
直到崩3的出现，让玩家们终于了解到手机上也能体验到大作的感觉。
但是似乎出了一点问题。
玩家甲：游戏是不错，就是有点废眼泪。
玩家乙：徐朔！米忽悠你做个人吧！
玩家丙：喜欢刀是吧？我要静步把你给刀了。
徐朔：怪我咯？
然而这只是米忽悠征途的一小步。
宝可梦让所有人都认识了黄皮耗子和喷水王八。
原神问世，开放世界，自由度极高的玩法，蒙德、璃月、稻妻精细的地图，PC移动互通的技术，一经推出举世震惊！
……
米忽悠终于站到了世界游戏的顶端。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/86986cfba81fbd4891892e5c0aa8d369","author":"涩涩的人","author_id":"","book_id":"7099271295698734095","book_name":"开局创建米忽悠，全网求我别刀了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0d0e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7100915115117314560","read_count":"26616","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1857329"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"838","tags":"都市种田,都市,穿越,直播,单女主,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/227ca297cd110d14e6e167bccc5b97b3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779434706&x-signature=axVD1U16ktUlHbpQZXUDp2gbyNs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3334137984330907","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"275136"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323152506E1A81FCE18F1659DA49E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":211,"forwarded_count":0,"lis
